title: Prangos goniocarpa
intro: Prangos goniocarpa, also known as the desert celery, is a perennial plant native to the Middle East and Central Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which may help to alleviate conditions such as arthritis, digestive issues, and wound infections. Bioactive constituents of Prangos goniocarpa include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are thought to contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Prangos goniocarpa is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into topical creams and salves for skin and wound care.
